ddls:
CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "classifier" TEXT /* Classifier used for the model */,
  "run" INTEGER /* Run identifier for the experiment */,
  "fold" INTEGER /* Fold number in cross-validation */,
  "build_time" REAL /* Time taken to build the model in seconds */,
  "model_version" TEXT /* Version of the model */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the dataset used for training */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the experiment the model is part of */,
  "preprocessing_steps" TEXT /* Preprocessing steps applied to the dataset */,
  "feature_engineering" TEXT /* Feature engineering techniques used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "evaluation_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric record */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the model being evaluated */,
  "auprc" REAL /* Average precision-recall score */,
  "auroc" REAL /* Area under the ROC curve */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the model */,
  "avg_precision" REAL /* Average precision of the model */,
  "hamming_loss" REAL /* Hamming loss of the model */,
  "f1_micro" REAL /* F1 score (micro-averaged) */,
  "f1_weighted" REAL /* F1 score (weighted) */,
  "precision_micro" REAL /* Precision (micro-averaged) */,
  "precision_weighted" REAL /* Precision (weighted) */,
  "recall_micro" REAL /* Recall (micro-averaged) */,
  "recall_weighted" REAL /* Recall (weighted) */,
  "roc_auc_micro" REAL /* ROC AUC (micro-averaged) */,
  "roc_auc_weighted" REAL /* ROC AUC (weighted) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evaluation_metrics_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "dataset_name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "label_cardinality_train" INTEGER /* Label cardinality for the training set */,
  "label_cardinality_test" INTEGER /* Label cardinality for the test set */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the dataset */,
  "format" TEXT /* Format of the dataset */,
  "size" TEXT /* Size of the dataset in bytes */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset content */,
  "preprocessing_steps" TEXT /* Preprocessing steps applied to the dataset before training */,
  "feature_engineering" TEXT /* Feature engineering techniques used on the dataset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metrics_over_time" (
  "track_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tracking record */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the model whose metrics are tracked */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the performance tracking */,
  "auprc" REAL /* Average precision-recall score */,
  "auroc" REAL /* Area under the ROC curve */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the model */,
  "f1_micro" REAL /* F1 score (micro-averaged) */,
  "f1_weighted" REAL /* F1 score (weighted) */,
  "precision_micro" REAL /* Precision (micro-averaged) */,
  "precision_weighted" REAL /* Precision (weighted) */,
  "recall_micro" REAL /* Recall (micro-averaged) */,
  "recall_weighted" REAL /* Recall (weighted) */,
  "roc_auc_micro" REAL /* ROC AUC (micro-averaged) */,
  "roc_auc_weighted" REAL /* ROC AUC (weighted) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("track_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., data scientist, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last user login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, inactive, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who conducted the experiment */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the model used in the experiment */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the dataset used in the experiment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the experiment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the experiment was created */,
  "started_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the experiment started */,
  "ended_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the experiment ended */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the experiment (e.g., running, completed, failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hyperparameters" (
  "hyperparameter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hyperparameter record */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the model associated with the hyperparameter */,
  "parameter_name" TEXT /* Name of the hyperparameter */,
  "parameter_value" TEXT /* Value of the hyperparameter */,
  "hyperparameter_group" TEXT /* Group or category of the hyperparameter */,
  "hyperparameter_description" TEXT /* Description of the hyperparameter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hyperparameter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hyperparameters_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "validation_results" (
  "validation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each validation result */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the model being validated */,
  "fold" INTEGER /* Fold number in cross-validation */,
  "exact_match" REAL /* Exact match score */,
  "f1_macro" REAL /* F1 score (macro averaged) */,
  "precision" REAL /* Precision score */,
  "recall" REAL /* Recall score */,
  "f1_score" REAL /* F1 score */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("validation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_validation_results_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "label_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistics record */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the model */,
  "label_cardinality" INTEGER /* Label cardinality for the model */,
  "levenshtein_distance" REAL /* Levenshtein distance for the model */,
  "jaccard_index" REAL /* Jaccard index for the model */,
  "label_distribution" TEXT /* Distribution of labels in the dataset */,
  "class_imbalance" REAL /* Measure of class imbalance in the dataset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_label_statistics_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "loss_scores" (
  "loss_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each loss score record */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the model being evaluated */,
  "log_loss" REAL /* Log loss score */,
  "zero_one_loss" REAL /* Zero-One loss score */,
  "hamming_loss" REAL /* Hamming loss score */,
  "mse" REAL /* Mean Squared Error */,
  "mae" REAL /* Mean Absolute Error */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("loss_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_loss_scores_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)
